CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-31-2017 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed. The Court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court 3.1385Judge: Teri L. Jackson; Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos; Proceedings not reported. (610)

OBJECTION HEARING CALENDAR
Off Calendar Mar-09-2016 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-12-2016 Continued To Mar-09-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-08-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Attorney Carlos Jato for Plaintiff Angela Goldfein the opposing party.
No appearance by the moving party.

The Court Adopts the Tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT ISAAC SUN DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is OVERRULED, 10 days to answer. First Amended Complaint is sufficiently alleged. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk J. Rumsey, Not Reported. (501)

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-11-2015 Continued To Jan-08-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances by the parties in this matter of DEFENDANT ISAAC SUN's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT. This matter is continued to January 8, 2016 on Court's own motion. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk J. Rumsey, Not Reported. (501)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-20-2015 Continued To Jan-27-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Nov-12-2015 Continued To Dec-11-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: DEFENDANT ISAAC SUN DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is continued to December 11, 2015. Moving party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6B and provide courtesy copy of moving papers and the operative complaint to department 501 no later than November 13, 2015 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Sep-15-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: Defendant's Demurrer to Complaint is
SUSTAINED with leave to amend for Plaintiff to address all issues raised by demurrer. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Not Reported, D501.
